name: ying-blog
description: A bilingual Vite, Vue, TypeScript, SSG, and Markdown project site baseline.

scripts.check: vp exec tsx scripts/content/generate.ts && vp check .env.example .github AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.md SECURITY.md SUPPORT.md docs index.html package.json package-lock.json public scripts src tests tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.node.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts && vp exec vue-tsc --noEmit && vp exec tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
scripts.test: vp exec tsx scripts/content/generate.ts && vp test run
scripts.build: vp exec vite-ssg build && vp exec tsx scripts/static-assets.ts && vp exec tsx scripts/verify-static-output.ts
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
